slides.headline: Maximize Efficiency

slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Group similar work for streamlined end-of-term certifications. Save time and reduce mistakes with these tips.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is the first one, as it could benefit from a more engaging headline to capture attention. A top fix would be to add a bold or larger font size to the headline to make it stand out more.
